message:
feat(engine): add 35 deep integration tests for resource governance and admission control

- resource_certificate_governance (17 tests): dimension enumeration, evidence
  utilisation calculations, content-hash determinism, edge cases for zero budget
- queueing_admission_control (18 tests): priority ranking, admission decisions,
  shed reason formatting, serde roundtrips, Display impls

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
